journey.title: My Minecraft Journey
journey.storyIntro: I've been creating Minecraft content and developing mods for years, combining my passion for gaming with programming expertise.
journey.contentCreationText: Creating tutorials, guides, and showcasing modpack configurations to help the community.
journey.modDevelopmentText: Building custom mods and tools to enhance the Minecraft experience.
journey.optimizationText: Focusing on creating lightweight, optimized modpacks that run smoothly on various hardware.
journey.modpacksText: Creating lightweight, optimized modpacks that run smoothly on various hardware.
journey.modsText: Building custom mods and tools to enhance the Minecraft experience.
journey.pluginsText: Developing server plugins for enhanced gameplay and community features.
